GRANT SELECT, INSERT ON database1.* TO user1, user2;
GRANT ALL ON database2.table1 TO user3 WITH GRANT OPTION;
GRANT SELECT ON database3.table2 TO user4 WITH REPLACE OPTION;
GRANT SELECT ON database4.* TO user5 WITH ADMIN OPTION;
GRANT INSERT ON database5.table3 (column1, column2) TO user6;
GRANT SELECT ON database6.table4 WHERE column1 > 100 TO user7;
GRANT ALL ON CURRENT GRANTS TO user8;
GRANT SELECT ON db.my_tables* TO user9;
GRANT SELECT ON db.* TO user10;
GRANT SELECT ON *.* TO user11;
GRANT INSERT ON database7.table5 TO user12 WITH GRANT OPTION;
GRANT ALTER ON database8.table6 TO user13;
GRANT CREATE NAMED COLLECTION TO user14;
GRANT DROP ON database9.table7 TO user15;
GRANT READ ON URL('http://example.com/*') TO user16;
GRANT SELECT ON database10.table8 (columnA, columnB) TO user17;
GRANT ALL ON user18 TO ALL;
GRANT INSERT ON database11.* TO user19 USING (SELECT * FROM some_other_table);
GRANT KILL QUERY ON *.* TO user20;
GRANT BACKUP ON *.* TO user21;
GRANT SELECT, UPDATE ON database12.table9 TO user22;
GRANT CURRENT GRANTS TO user23;
GRANT DELETE ON database13.* TO user24 WITH REPLACE OPTION;
GRANT OPTIMIZE TABLE ON database14.table10 TO user25;
GRANT SHOW ON database15.table11 TO user26;
GRANT SYSTEM RELOAD DICTIONARY ON *.* TO user27;
GRANT EXECUTE ON database16.table12 TO user28;
GRANT SELECT ON (SELECT columnX FROM db.tableX) TO user29;
